models.name: Llama 4 Maverick
models.description: 400B MoE model with 17 active experts, 1M native context

changelog.description: Llama 4 Maverick released as open-source 400B MoE model
Meta confirmed Llama 4 Behemoth was still in training, leaving Maverick and Scout as the current released Llama 4 models

models.name: Llama 4 Scout
models.description: 109B MoE model with 10M context window, 16 active experts

changelog.description: Llama 4 Scout launched with industry-leading 10M token context

models.name: Llama 3.3
models.description: 70B model matching Llama 3.1 405B performance at fraction of compute

changelog.description: Llama 3.3 70B released, matching 405B quality at lower cost

models.name: Llama 3.1
models.description: First open-source model to rival GPT-4 class, available in 8B/70B/405B

changelog.description: Quantized and distilled variants released by community

models.name: Llama 2
models.description: Legacy open-source model, replaced by Llama 3 series
